entity.summary: Mantle-native decentralized exchange combining token swaps, limit orders, classic automated-market-maker pools, Liquidity Book markets, farming, staking, gauges, voting rewards, and liquidity vaults.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Merchant Moe as an active Mantle-native DEX and liquidity hub. Trading documentation covers market swaps and limit orders, while the current contract registry publishes factory, pair, router, Liquidity Book, staking, reward, and governance contracts. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Welcome to Merchant Moe
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Merchant Moe as a decentralized exchange for Mantle Network with trading, liquidity, farming, Liquidity Book, staking, and governance functions.

evidence.title: Merchant Moe contracts
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry publishes current Moe factory, pair, router, Liquidity Book factory, router, quoter, staking, reward, fee, voting, and token contracts on Mantle.
